response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (The Reference JSON indicates no vocal music is present, so we've transitioned to 100% manual transcription of spoken dialogue). 2. JSON Usage: Entirely manual transcription and translation, as the video consists of commentary. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all spoken lines precisely to vocal starts and ends. Re-allocated reading time to prevent delays during fast speech, and translated Japanese cultural terms (such as Suika to watermelon, Oishii to delicious) where appropriate for English subtitles.
